name: Tri Power Bracelet
details:
Product Description

Bring strength, calmness and protection into one powerful combination with the Tri Power Bracelet. This coordinated set includes three crystal bracelets designed with bold Red Jasper, calming white Howlite and glossy Black Obsidian beads.

Each bracelet features a different arrangement of the three crystals—one with a balanced colour pattern, one with an evenly mixed design and one with a bold Red Jasper base and detailed centre arrangement. Together, they create a versatile trio that can be worn as a complete stack or styled separately according to your mood and intention.

Red Jasper is traditionally associated with stability and strength, Howlite with patience and relaxation, and Black Obsidian with grounding and protection. This makes the Tri Power Bracelet a meaningful accessory for staying confident, calm and protected throughout the day.

Why Choose It?

Three Bracelets in One Set:
Includes three coordinated crystal bracelets with different arrangements for multiple styling options.

Triple Crystal Combination:
Brings together Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian in a balanced and meaningful design.

Power-Inspired Symbolism:
Represents strength, a steady mindset and protection from distracting or negative energy.

Distinct Individual Designs:
Every bracelet has a complete individual appearance while complementing the other two when stacked.

Flexible Slip-On Construction:
The stretch-style design makes the bracelets convenient to put on and remove.

Bold Unisex Styling:
The red, white, black and gold colour palette works effortlessly with different personal styles.

Key Highlights
Set of three coordinated bracelets
Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian beads
Strength, calmness and protection-inspired combination
Red, white, black and gold colour palette
Polished metallic spacer detailing
Flexible stretch-style construction
Wear together or separately
Suitable for everyday styling and gifting
Crafted With
Red Jasper Beads

The rich red beads bring warmth and boldness to all three bracelets. Red Jasper is traditionally associated with grounding, stability, courage and inner strength. Studd Muffyn describes it as an everyday anchor for staying steady and centred during uncertain or demanding moments.

Howlite Beads

The white beads feature subtle grey marbling, giving every bracelet a naturally distinctive appearance. Howlite is traditionally connected with relaxation, patience and maintaining a more balanced mindset during busy situations.

Black Obsidian Beads

The glossy black beads add depth and contrast to the trio. Black Obsidian is traditionally associated with protection and grounding, especially when dealing with stressful or negative surroundings.

Metallic Spacer Accents

Gold-toned and dark metallic spacers separate selected crystal beads and add a polished, premium-looking finish.

Textured Centre Accent

One bracelet features a textured dark centre bead framed with detailed metallic elements, giving the trio a stronger statement appearance.

Flexible Stretch Cord

The elastic construction allows each bracelet to slide comfortably over the hand without requiring a clasp.

Crystal Significance
Red Jasper — Strength and Stability

Red Jasper is traditionally worn as a symbol of courage, grounding and steady progress. It may serve as a reminder to remain consistent and confident while working towards personal goals.

Howlite — Calmness and Patience

Howlite is commonly associated with relaxation, patience and emotional steadiness. It may help symbolise the importance of responding calmly rather than reacting impulsively.

Black Obsidian — Protection and Grounding

Black Obsidian is traditionally connected with energetic protection, grounding and remaining less affected by surrounding stress or negativity.

Together, these three crystals represent balanced power—the strength to move forward, the calmness to think clearly and the protection to remain grounded.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.

Product Benefits

Encourages Inner Strength:
Red Jasper is traditionally associated with confidence, endurance and the determination to remain consistent.

Supports a Calm Mindset:
Howlite represents patience, relaxation and a more thoughtful response to stressful situations.

Promotes Grounding and Protection:
Black Obsidian is commonly worn as a symbolic shield from negativity and emotionally draining surroundings.

Creates Balanced Energy:
The three-crystal combination represents strength without aggression, calmness without passivity and protection without fear.

Offers Multiple Styling Options:
Wear all three together, choose one according to your intention or create a two-bracelet stack.

Adds a Bold Colour Statement:
The red, white and black tones enhance everyday outfits without appearing overly heavy.

Thoughtful Gifting Choice:
Suitable for birthdays, career milestones, new beginnings, festive occasions and personal motivation gifting.
